name: elevate-demo
description: Elevate-style health insurance issuance demo: journey frontend + core policy system + AI feasibility portal

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix core-service install && npm --prefix ai-service install && npm --prefix journey-app install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n core,ai,web -c green,magenta,cyan "npm --prefix core-service start" "npm --prefix ai-service start" "npm --prefix journey-app run dev"
